PermitPulse
Resources Snapshot Sample Permit Review Plus
PermitPulse Snapshot

Send one address. We'll tell you what needs checking first.

A free first-look public-record screen that points you toward the records worth checking before you spend real money.

Request Free Snapshot Text an Address

Included

  • Jurisdiction guess
  • Likely public portals to check
  • First-pass risk category: Low / Medium / Unknown
  • 3 records worth verifying next

Not included

  • Full official screenshot packet
  • Full permit history memo
  • Design, legal, engineering, or approval advice
Full Report Format

How the Permit Review Plus decision snapshot is organized.

The free Snapshot is a quick screen. The paid report is a clean PDF decision snapshot backed by official public records.

Decision Snapshot

Plain-English read on one address, built for the next decision.

Official Source Checklist

Which public sources were checked and which ones still need a manual pull.

PermitPulse Research Log

Searches, portals, dates, source notes, and access limits.

What We Checked

Permit history, parcel clues, scope, status, finals, and obvious mismatches.

What We Found

Clear record signals, gaps, and risk notes from available public records.

What Needs Manual Confirmation

Items to verify with the city, owner, professional, or source office.

Recommended Next Move

What to ask, request, confirm, or pause before committing.

Evidence Pack

Screenshots, links, and official-source references where available.

Free Intake

Give us the address and the decision.

The better the context, the better the first-pass screen. Keep it short: buying, listing, bidding, ADU, remodel, unpermitted work, or general research.

Need the full checked report?

Choose the level that matches the decision in front of you.

Free Directional Pointer

I’ll tell you where I would check first.

Text an Address

A first-pass official public-record snapshot for one property address.

Express Permit Review Plus
$300 when available

Target turnaround is 4 business hours or less when scheduling and source access allow.

Request Express Review

PermitPulse also tracks public-record signals through the Red Tape Index, Radar, and Top Permits pages. See who it helps.

PermitPulse is a first-pass public-record review. It is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, code determination, permit expeditor service, or permit approval guarantee.

Availability note

Express availability depends on request time, property complexity, source availability, and public portal access.
